meaning: adj.使人惊动的,令人担忧的
examples: The disease has spread at an alarming rate.
The rainforests are disappearing at an alarming rate.
The number of reported crimes is increasing at an alarming rate.
The pastoral disappointments of the 1990s have led to a couple of alarming responses.
One potentially alarming trend is banks pulling back consumer credit lines, says Oppenheimer analyst Meredith Whitney.
